use sqlx::PgPool;

#[derive(sqlx::FromRow)]
struct OrderSummary {
    id: i64,
    customer_name: String,
    total: f64,
}

async fn get_order_summaries(pool: &PgPool) -> Result<Vec<OrderSummary>, sqlx::Error> {
    // GOOD: explicit column projection matches struct fields
    sqlx::query_as::<_, OrderSummary>(
        "SELECT id, customer_name, total FROM orders"
    )
    .fetch_all(pool)
    .await
}
